classes.A: Competent rock; measured shear-wave velocity Vs >= 1500 m/s.
classes.C: Very dense soil or soft rock; 360 m/s <= Vs < 760 m/s, or the alternative N/su criteria in Table 3.10.3.1-1.
classes.D: Stiff soil; 180 m/s <= Vs < 360 m/s, or the alternative N/su criteria in Table 3.10.3.1-1.
classes.E: Vs < 180 m/s, alternative low-N/low-su criteria, or more than 3 m of soft clay as defined in Table 3.10.3.1-1.
classes.F: Soils requiring site-specific evaluation, including seismically unstable/collapsible soils, thick highly organic soils, high-plasticity clays, and thick medium-to-soft clay strata.

importantQualification: This summary is an index, not a replacement for the complete classification methods, averaging rules, exceptions, and definitions in 3.10.3.1.
source: CCP-14 Section 3, Table 3.10.3.1-1, printed pages 3-51 and 3-52
